docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABU-NIE, SUZY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-05-2025 BY JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF SUZY ABU-NIE APPEARED.
